activation.modeNotes: observe=read sources.json only, no fetch; shadow=fetch + write to evidence/, no public artifacts/; active=fetch + write digest+items to artifacts/; disabled=short-circuit. Runtime override: factories/ai-radar/state/mode.json. Kill-switch: factories/ai-radar/state/disabled (wins over everything).

summary: Upstream intelligence factory. Collects official AI ecosystem signals (changelogs, GitHub releases, arXiv) and emits structured RadarItem records plus a daily markdown digest. No upgrade application; that is PR #9+.
objective: Convert external AI ecosystem changes into deduplicated, trust-tiered RadarItems plus a daily markdown digest, without mutating other frontier-os surfaces.

perSource.ok: fetch HTTP 200 AND parsed AND >=1 normalized item
perSource.stale: fetch HTTP 200 AND parsed AND 0 new items (all already-seen)
perSource.failed: fetch non-200 OR parse error OR normalize error

final.passed: all sources ok|stale AND digest written AND killSwitchActive==false

scope.deferredTo: PR-9 (upgrade planner + claim ledger), PR-10 (Discord+YouTube collectors), PR-11 (model policy loop), PR-12 (cloud witness)
